ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lgas" (
  "lga_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each LGA */,
  "lga_name" TEXT /* Name of the local government area */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the LGA */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the LGA data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lga_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "lga_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the LGA where the case was reported */,
  "case_date" TEXT /* Date when the case was reported */,
  "patient_age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "patient_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "acquisition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the acquisition type */,
  "overseas_acquired" INTEGER /* Number of cases acquired overseas */,
  "locally_acquired_contact_known" INTEGER /* Number of locally acquired cases with known contact */,
  "locally_acquired_no_contact_known" INTEGER /* Number of locally acquired cases with no known contact */,
  "interstate_acquired" INTEGER /* Number of cases acquired from interstate */,
  "under_investigation" INTEGER /* Number of cases currently under investigation */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_lga_id FOREIGN KEY ("lga_id") REFERENCES lgas ("lga_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_acquisition_id FOREIGN KEY ("acquisition_id") REFERENCES case_acquisition ("acquisition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_acquisition" (
  "acquisition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each acquisition type */,
  "acquisition_type" TEXT /* Type of acquisition (e.g., Overseas, Local with contact, Local without contact) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the acquisition type */,
  "is_cluster" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the acquisition is part of a cluster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("acquisition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_investigation" (
  "investigation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investigation */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case under investigation */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the investigation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the investigation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the investigation */,
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user conducting the investigation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the investigation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_investigation_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_investigation_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("investigator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_tracing" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact tracing event */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case for which contact tracing is conducted */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact */,
  "contact_date" TEXT /* Date when the contact was traced */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the contact tracing (e.g., isolated, tested negative) */,
  "isolation_status" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the contact is in isolation */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the contact's test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_tracing_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interstate_travel" (
  "travel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interstate travel event */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case related to the interstate travel */,
  "origin_state" TEXT /* State of origin for the interstate travel */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Date of arrival in the state */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Date of departure from the state */,
  "travel_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the interstate travel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("travel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interstate_travel_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "overseas_travel" (
  "travel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each overseas travel event */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case related to the overseas travel */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country of origin for the overseas travel */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Date of arrival in the state */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Date of departure from the state */,
  "travel_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the overseas travel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("travel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_overseas_travel_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., epidemiologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the case */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the case data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_access_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
